messages:
مرحبا 
بدي استغسر هي شقه مناسبه لي لكن تاريخ من ٢٦/١٢ 
الى ١/١/٢٠٢٦ هل عندك هذي تواريخ لهذي الشقه
مساء الخير اجينا نحجز نكمل الحجز طلع ليه من تاريخ ٢٦/١٢ ل٣٠
انا عايزه من ٢٦/ ١٢ الى ١/١/٢٠٢٦
ممكن تعدل التاريخ لو سمحت
وعايزه استاذنك لو سمحت تشيك ان بدر لو على ساعه ١٢
وتشك اوت يكون متاخر على ٨ مساء
الو
Hi Omar, Coming back from sharm el shiekh visit around 8 pm today , 4 people indian , Me and my wife , my friend and his wife.
Please accept i will reach in 3 hrs
Yes
Just coming to sleep today
6 am i will checkout
Okay

Hi Omar,
My name is Rawan Bakri and I’m from Saudi Arabia. I’m booking this apartment for my mother, Mona, and her sister, Sanaa. They visit Cairo often and truly love the city.
We chose your apartment because it’s in a safe area and close to many restaurants and malls, which makes it a perfect fit for them.
Thank you, and we look forward to staying at your place.

Okay no worries. 
No need for early checkin they will be there at 3:00
Do you need their passports?
عمر انت حتستقبلهم؟ عشان ماما بتسال كيف حتدخل البيت هل الباب عليه قفل بالرقم و لا تقابلهم و تعطيهم المفاتيح
للاحتياط لو تبغا جوازاتهم

Hello Omar, 
My mom texted you through WhatsApp and sent the passports.

Hello Omar, 
Yes, please I want to do late check out after 11:00
How can I pay for it?
Oh, thanks a lot Omar I really appreciate it 🙏
Alsalam alikom Mr Omar, I will be landing tomorrow early . Please let me know if I could do an early check in. It will be me alone this time and my cousin will follow in a few days . Thank you !!!
USA
I am on the plane and about to loose connection
He also has a USA passport
Please let me know if I could do early check in as I will land early tomorrow in Cairo
Message unsent
Message unsent
I am already in Cairo , just let me know when I can check in . I will be running some earrings until then. Thank you !
Hello Mr Omar , thank you
Please don’t let anyone enter the apartment when we are not there.
Great thank you . Though someone entered and left some towels the other day
Thank you
